🚀 Big Launches.title: Google to invest $1.5 billion in Alabama data center campus
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Salesforce acquires AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6B
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Salesforce says it wants to use Fin's team and technology to improve Agentforce, its existing enterprise platform that businesses can use to build custom AI agents that automate tasks.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: Hugging Face Transformers
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: A library of pre-trained models for natural language processing, computer vision, and more.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: A Definition of Good Explanations and the Challenges Explaining LLM Outputs
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: A study on defining good explanations for AI outputs, crucial for AI adoption in many contexts.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Dr-DCI: Scaling Direct Corpus Interaction via Dynamic Workspace Expansion
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: A paper on scaling direct corpus interaction via dynamic workspace expansion, relevant to agentic search and AI adoption.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Trump's Anthropic shutdown just made the case for non-American AI
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: The incident highlights the risks of relying on American AI companies and the need for sovereign AI solutions.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Big Tech's desperate last push at AI regulation
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Big Tech is pushing for comprehensive federal AI regulation, but the process is complex and contentious.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Relational Structural Causal Models
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: A study on learning causal models of environments that support reasoning about interventions and counterfactuals.

tool_of_day.title: Hugging Face Transformers
tool_of_day.summary: A library of pre-trained models for natural language processing, computer vision, and more.

hot_take: The recent Anthropic shutdown highlights the need for sovereign AI solutions and the importance of considering the risks of relying on American AI companies in the global AI landscape.
